input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(9, 12, 13) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(17, 23, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].font-family: "Source Sans 3", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

input[type=\"text\"].font-family: "Source Sans 3", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

kbd.background: rgb(12, 16, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(0, 80, 59, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
mark.font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

pre.--ec-uiFontFml: "Source Sans 3", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"
pre.background: rgb(12, 16, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre:has(> code.language-mermaid).background: rgb(12, 16, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

progress.font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

strong.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(45deg, rgb(133, 255, 149) 0%, rgb(188, 255, 125) 100%) no-repeat scroll 0% 0% / 100% padding-box text
strong.font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

strong > em.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(45deg, rgb(133, 255, 149) 0%, rgb(188, 255, 125) 100%) no-repeat scroll 0% 0% / 100% padding-box text
strong > em.font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

sub.font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

sup.font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

svg.lucide-help-circle.svg-icon.font-family: "Source Sans 3", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

svg.lucide-pencil.svg-icon.font-family: "Source Sans 3", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

svg.lucide-x.svg-icon.font-family: "Source Sans 3", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

tbody tr.background: rgb(14, 19, 21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(17, 23, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(14, 19, 21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(14, 19, 21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

video.font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"
